series_metadata.series_description: A formal order issued by the Division denying an application for a liquor permit. (fna PM-224)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Current year is kept in the office area, then scanned on the License Issuance Tracking System and paper is destroyed after scanning is checked for quality and completeness ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on computer database until superseded or until record series is no longer created, then destroy by erasure., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
